pipeline.name: Name
pipeline.title: From lead to pipeline in one view
pipeline.description: Track your solar prospects with a unified pipeline. Building data, kWp, inverter and panel specs, and estimated production — all in one place.
pipeline.tableViewDesc: Photo, kWp, status & output at a glance
pipeline.searchTitle: Find buildings that match your criteria
pipeline.searchDescription: Filter by business type, usable area and location. Identify the most promising commercial rooftops in a few clicks.

prospect.title: The Ultimate Shareable Prospect Portal
prospect.description: Instantly transform raw technical data into a stunning, interactive proposal page. Your prospects don't just see numbers; they see their future energy savings in high definition.
prospect.liveViewDesc: Know exactly when they open it

site.name: RADIANZ
site.tagline: Spot Potential from the Sky. Close Deals on the Ground.
site.vision: The ultimate B2B lead generation tool. Identify commercial rooftops via satellite, analyze solar potential instantly, and send interactive proposals that convert.

hero.buildingsScannedDesc: Buildings scanned for solar potential analysis
hero.higherCloseRateDesc: More deals closed with qualified prospects
hero.capacityAnalyzedDesc: Total solar capacity across our portfolio

feature.description: At Radianz, we don't just provide maps — we provide vision. Since 2025, our platform has empowered commercial solar teams to identify hidden value in rooftops, transforming cold prospecting into warm, data-backed conversations instantly.
feature.commercialRoofDesc: Advanced algorithms analyze roof pitch, shading, and usable area instantly. Filter by square footage and business type to find your perfect customer profile.
feature.fasterQualificationDesc: Rank prospects by potential and quality to prioritize your actions.
feature.officialDataDesc: Solar production and public business databases for reliable estimates.
feature.smartMatchingDesc: Highlight the most qualified leads ranked by your criteria — existing rooftops or future sites.
